allocation_policy.train_partition: T_train_S0 receives all remaining disjoint contexts
allocation_policy.allocator: stable per-task shuffle plus round-robin consumption

notes: Single stock LIBERO tasks on this installation expose 50 init-state templates each.
The proposal's 24-seed plus 20-val plus 20-test split is therefore enforced at the semantic proxy-family level rather than per single concrete task.

families.substitution_note: Stock LIBERO does not expose a literal block-to-tray benchmark family with enough templates. These three LIBERO-90 single-object pick-to-tray tasks are the closest reproducible proxy.

Stock LIBERO does not expose enough can-into-bowl templates to support disjoint 24/20/20 Stage-0 splits. These three LIBERO-90 object-into-basket tasks are the nearest high-volume receptacle-placement proxy.
Stock LIBERO stacking tasks use bowls rather than blocks. They are still the closest available two-object stacking family in the benchmark.
Stock LIBERO does not expose a named marked-region benchmark. These caddy-compartment placement tasks are the nearest stable place-into-goal-region proxy.
These three LIBERO-90 tasks are direct drawer-open tasks and therefore the cleanest Stage-0 proxy family.
